title: Echoes Of Gallifrey (NOT UNDER DEVELOPMENT)
description: A Large Doctor Who Modpack In Which You Have To Race Against A Solar Apocalypse On Earth, Defeat Three Insane Bosses, And Create A TARDIS
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d7a657e0ce25284eb893c425a9af14c10bc8410.png)



THIS MODPACK IS KINDA FLAWED, IF YOU FIND ANY BUGS JOIN MY DISCORD AND GIVE ME INFO AND I MIGHT FIX THEM, HOWEVER THIS MODPACK HAS (OR WILL HAVE) A SUCCESSOR, GALLIFREY, THE LONG WAY HOME IS UNDER DEVELOPMENT! 

This modpack is set in a paralel reality, in which the atomic bomb dropped on japan that ended world war two; instead ended all life on earth. However billions of years later, with the enemies of the universe vanquished, life on earth regrew, but somethings wrong, crops grow slower, snow starts to melt, and you only have fifty days to escape the planet before disaster strickes.
However when you leave your safe haven, the universe is not as peacefull as you were told, and so you must fight gods, battle aliens, and cross the gallaxy to eventually create magic of science, to harness the powers of the gods themselves to create a TARDIS.


this modpack is an RPG game meaning youll have to complete quests and unlock skills(comming soon) 


[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/fZUCBfsN9r)


modpack instructions
